author: ujizin
message:
docs: pin theme variant and allow venv python override

Zensical is pre-1.0; explicit variant guards against default changes.
PYTHON override works around brew pythons that cannot create venvs.

author: ujizin
message: style(docs): improve documentation styling

author: ujizin
message: docs: reference zensical instead of mkdocs

author: ujizin
message: build: add docs Makefile targets and ignore .venv

author: ujizin
message: ci: build docs with zensical instead of mkdocs

author: ujizin
message: docs: replace mkdocs.yml with zensical.toml

author: ujizin
message: build: wire android ABI shim only into checkKotlinAbi/updateKotlinAbi

author: ujizin
message:
docs: migrate ABI commands to checkKotlinAbi/updateKotlinAbi

Legacy task names are deprecated since Kotlin 2.4. The android ABI shim
still hooks both name generations for anyone running the old tasks.

author: ujizin
message:
build: adapt android ABI validation to Kotlin 2.4 and Gradle 9.6

Wire androidApiCheck/Dump into both legacy and new checkKotlinAbi task
names, replace deprecated kotlin-dsl delegates, and regenerate the
android baseline after the Kotlin 2.4/Compose 1.11 lambda mangling change.

author: ujizin
message:
build: validate android ABI via buildSrc convention plugin

KGP abiValidation ignores the AGP KMP android target (KT-71172), so
androidMain public API changes passed checkLegacyAbi unchecked. Root BCV
plugin was also a no-op. Dump/check android ABI with BCV task classes at
api/android/<module>.api, wired into check/updateLegacyAbi.

author: ujizin
message: build: bump version to 1.0.3

author: ujizin
message:
fix(ios): use per-session dispatch queue instead of global singleton

Each CameraSession now owns its own serial queue so session B's
startCamera does not block behind session A's dispose/stopRunning.

author: ujizin
message:
refactor(ios): remove mute during recording and enable audio on video capture mode

Mute recording is not supported on iOS because AVFoundation cannot
add/remove audio input while a capture session is recording. Calling
muteRecording now returns Result.failure(MuteNotSupportedException).

Audio input is enabled when switching to CaptureMode.Video inside the
same withSessionConfiguration block as the output swap, preventing the
camera blink that occurred when audio was added at recording start.

author: ujizin
message:
ci: use macos-26 runners for Xcode 26 compatibility

Compose Multiplatform 1.11.1 links against iOS 26 APIs
(UIViewLayoutRegion, UIUtilities) which require Xcode 26.

author: ujizin
message:
build: bump Kotlin 2.4.0, Compose 1.11.1, Gradle 9.6.0, and other dependencies

- Kotlin 2.3.10 → 2.4.0
- Compose Multiplatform 1.10.2 → 1.11.1
- Gradle wrapper 9.1.0 → 9.6.0
- AGP 9.0.1 → 9.2.1
- Spotless 8.3.0 → 8.7.0
- Dokka 2.1.0 → 2.2.0
- Coroutines 1.10.2 → 1.11.0
- compileSdk 36 → 37 (required by lifecycle 2.11.0)
- Remove iosX64 target (dropped by Compose Multiplatform 1.11.1)
- Simplify abiValidation() call
- Bump sample dependencies (compose-bom, lifecycle, navigation, etc.)

author: ujizin
message:
fix(ios): implement detachPreviewLayer in TestIOSCameraController

Add missing interface method and update ABI dump to fix CI.

author: ujizin
message:
fix(ios): async camera lifecycle with proper preview reattachment

- Move camera start to viewWillAppear (guaranteed on re-navigation)
- Keep viewDidLayoutSubviews for frame updates only (idempotent)
- Detach preview layer in viewDidDisappear, reattach on appear
- Make PreviewManager.attachView idempotent (guard sublayer/observer)
- Sync orientation to main thread after session start
- Guard gestures on isStreaming to prevent null captureDevice crash
- Make startCamera idempotent via isRunning check
- Dispatch dispose async on shared camera queue
- Fix FakeIosCameraController.captureSession to return same instance

author: ujizin
message: fix(gesture): avoid perform gestures action when camera is not streaming

author: ujizin
message:
fix(ios): use per-session capture outputs instead of singletons

Replace file-level singleton photoOutput/videoOutput with per-session
factory createOutput(). Each AVCaptureSession now owns its outputs,
eliminating cross-session conflicts when sessions overlap briefly.

Also key CameraPreview on cameraSession so UIKitViewController
recreates properly when session changes.

author: ujizin
message:
fix(ios): dispatch session teardown on camera queue

Serialize output/input removal and stopRunning with start() on
the same cameraQueue to prevent race condition on rapid open/close.

author: ujizin
message: build: ignore git worktrees and settings local json

author: ujizin
message: fix(ios): remove capture input/outputs from session when disposed

author: ujizin
message: fix(lifecycle): use lifecycle paramater to bind camera

author: ujizin
message:
refactor(android): recreate child lifecycle on bindToLifecycle

bindToLifecycle now disposes the old CameraLifecycleOwner and creates
a fresh one, eliminating the need for nuclear unbind() in rebind()
and CamFormat.applyConfigs.

author: ujizin
message:
fix(android): rebind preview when CameraController is recreated

Move view binding from LaunchedEffect to AndroidView update block.
Factory only runs once — when CameraController changes, the new
session's previewView was null so onViewBind never fired, freezing
the preview. Now update detects controller mismatch and rebinds.

author: ujizin
message:
fix(android): use per-session child lifecycle instead of unbindAll on dispose

CameraLifecycleOwner wraps parent lifecycle per session. On dispose,
only child lifecycle destroyed — ProcessCameraProvider unbinds just
that session's use cases, not all.

author: ujizin
message:
fix(android): remove explicit unbind to prevent dark screen on navigation

CameraX's ProcessCameraProvider is a process-wide singleton.
LifecycleCameraController.unbind() calls ProcessCameraProvider.unbindAll(),
which kills ALL camera sessions across the app. When navigating between
screens with cameras, the disposing screen's unbind() would kill the
newly bound screen's camera, causing a dark screen.

CameraX automatically manages use case cleanup via lifecycle observation,
so explicit unbind is unnecessary and harmful in multi-screen scenarios.

Closes #93

author: ujizin
message: docs: adjust usage example of custom own camera selector

author: ujizin
message: build: bump version to v1.0.2

author: ujizin
message:
ci(android-test): include target in AVD cache key

Changing the emulator target without updating the cache key causes
stale AVD snapshots to be reused, breaking emulator boot.
